description_long: This is a large, modern industrial factory complex featuring multiple rectangular buildings with flat white roofs and blue-accented facades. The site is organized with clear internal roads, green spaces, and several covered areas, including what appear to be loading bays and parking zones. The perimeter is enclosed by a fence, and the main entrance is accessible from a wide road. Several large windows line the buildings, providing natural light to the interior workspaces. The grounds include visible construction equipment and vehicles, suggesting active industrial operations. The overall layout is efficient and functional, with a focus on accessibility and workflow.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with multiple flat-roofed buildings, blue accents, and large windows, surrounded by internal roads and green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several large buildings, internal roads, and a prominent road along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back entrances, covered parking or loading areas, and fenced boundary.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main factory building, large windows, and adjacent green spaces with visible construction equipment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the largest building, covered areas, and the internal road network.
